hours_notice: Hours listed are current as of June 2026 and may differ during the academic year. Always verify at dining.missouri.edu before visiting.

items.name: Plaza 900
items.notes: The largest dining hall on campus. All-you-care-to-eat with the largest salad bar on campus (locally sourced hydroponic lettuce), burgers, chicken sandwiches, specialty pizzas, made-to-order eggs, and Central Dairy ice cream. Halal, vegan, and vegetarian options available.

items.name: The MARK on 5th Street
items.location: Mark Twain Residence Hall, 515 S 5th St, Columbia, MO 65211
items.notes: All-you-care-to-eat with a quieter, restaurant-style atmosphere. Features The Mark Deli (build-your-own stir fry and ramen bowls), pizza, a fresh salad bar, patty melts, and Central Dairy ice cream. Halal, vegan, and vegetarian options available. Tiger Cash also accepted.

items.name: Restaurants at Southwest
items.notes: À la carte food hall with six restaurants: Legacy Grill (burgers, quesadillas), Olive + Oil (pasta), 1•5•3 Salads & Soup, Tiger Deli (Philly sandwiches), and 1839 Kitchen (comfort foods). Bright, open seating area. Dining Dollars and Tiger Cash accepted.

items.name: Savor Kitchen
items.location: Johnston Hall, 1100 Rollins St, Columbia, MO 65211
items.notes: Build-a-bowl concept with over 15,000 possible combinations of bases, proteins, and sauces. Also serves breakfast (thick-cut bacon, fluffy pancakes, acai bowls) and Grab & Go options. Certified Free From™ for all top-9 allergens — a great option for students with food allergies. Dining Dollars accepted.

items.name: Mizzou Market – Central
items.location: MU Student Center, 901 Rollins St, Columbia, MO 65201
items.notes: Convenience market stocking snacks, beverages, protein drinks, household essentials, and laundry supplies. Dining Dollars and Tiger Cash accepted.

items.name: Starbucks – Memorial Union
items.notes: Full Starbucks menu. Tiger Cash and Dining Dollars accepted. Convenient central campus location.

items.name: Bookmark Café
items.notes: Café inside Ellis Library. Grab & Go items, coffee, and light snacks. Perfect for a study break without leaving the library. Dining Dollars accepted.
